allow: PowerShell(New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path "app/core","app/db","app/models","app/routers" | Out-Null; "app/__init__.py","app/core/__init__.py","app/db/__init__.py","app/models/__init__.py","app/routers/__init__.py" | ForEach-Object { if \(-not \(Test-Path $_\)\) { New-Item -ItemType File -Path $_ | Out-Null } }; Get-ChildItem -Recurse app | Select-Object FullName)
